parameters.name: Relative frequency setpoint
parameters.purpose: Sets the motor speed reference as a percentage of base frequency

source_citation.excerpt: P0100: Relative frequency setpoint — Sets the motor speed reference as a percentage of base frequency (fmax).

parameters.name: Maximum frequency
parameters.purpose: Defines the maximum motor frequency limit to prevent overspeed and mechanical damage

source_citation.excerpt: P0104: Maximum frequency — Defines the maximum motor frequency to limit overspeed conditions.

parameters.name: Minimum frequency
parameters.purpose: Defines the minimum motor frequency to ensure adequate motor cooling at low speeds

source_citation.excerpt: P0105: Minimum frequency — Defines the minimum motor frequency for low-speed operation.

parameters.name: Motor type selection
parameters.purpose: Selects the motor type (1AC, 3AC, DC, PM) and operating mode for proper control algorithms

source_citation.excerpt: P0300: Motor type selection — Selects the motor type (1AC, 3AC, DC, PM) for the drive control algorithm.

parameters.name: Motor rated power
parameters.purpose: Specifies the motor nameplate power rating for thermal protection and load estimation

source_citation.excerpt: P0304: Motor rated power — Specifies the motor nameplate power for thermal and load calculations.

parameters.name: Motor rated speed
parameters.purpose: Sets the motor nameplate speed (rpm) for control tuning and thermal monitoring

source_citation.excerpt: P0305: Motor rated speed — Sets the motor nameplate speed in rpm for control tuning.

parameters.name: Motor rated current
parameters.purpose: Specifies the motor nameplate current for overcurrent protection and thermal derating

source_citation.excerpt: P0310: Motor rated current — Specifies the motor nameplate current for protection and derating.

parameters.name: Thermal motor protection
parameters.purpose: Enables/disables thermal protection model to prevent motor overtemperature damage

source_citation.excerpt: P0644: Thermal motor protection — Enables or disables the thermal protection model for the motor.

parameters.name: Thermal time constant motor
parameters.purpose: Sets the motor thermal time constant (tau) for accurate temperature estimation during continuous operation

source_citation.excerpt: P0645: Thermal time constant motor — Sets the motor thermal time constant for temperature estimation.

parameters.name: Current PI-controller P-gain
parameters.purpose: Proportional gain for current control loop; higher values increase responsiveness but risk oscillation

source_citation.excerpt: P1000: Current PI-controller P-gain — Sets the proportional gain for inner current loop control.

parameters.name: Current PI-controller I-gain
parameters.purpose: Integral gain for current control loop; ensures zero steady-state error but higher values slow transient response

source_citation.excerpt: P1001: Current PI-controller I-gain — Sets the integral gain for inner current loop control.

parameters.name: Ramp time (acceleration)
parameters.purpose: Sets the time duration to accelerate from standstill to maximum frequency; prevents mechanical shock and overcurrent

source_citation.excerpt: P1200: Ramp time (acceleration) — Sets the time duration from 0 to fmax in seconds.

parameters.name: Ramp time (deceleration)
parameters.purpose: Sets the time duration to decelerate from maximum frequency to standstill; provides smooth stop and current management

source_citation.excerpt: P1201: Ramp time (deceleration) — Sets the time duration from fmax to 0 in seconds.

parameters.name: Line reactor commissioning
parameters.purpose: Indicates whether a line reactor is installed; enables protective algorithms if present

source_citation.excerpt: P2000: Line reactor commissioning — Indicates whether a line reactor is installed on the AC input.

parameters.name: DC link overvoltage limit
parameters.purpose: Sets the maximum DC link voltage threshold before F30001 (overvoltage) fault is triggered

source_citation.excerpt: P2010: DC link overvoltage limit — Sets the maximum DC link voltage threshold before overvoltage fault.

parameters.name: DC link undervoltage limit
parameters.purpose: Sets the minimum DC link voltage threshold below which F30002 (undervoltage) fault is triggered

source_citation.excerpt: P2011: DC link undervoltage limit — Sets the minimum DC link voltage threshold before undervoltage fault.

parameters.name: Heat sink temperature threshold
parameters.purpose: Defines the maximum heatsink temperature before F30006 (inverter overtemperature) fault is triggered for thermal protection

source_citation.excerpt: P0292: Heat sink temperature threshold — Sets the maximum heatsink temperature for thermal protection.

parameters.name: Heat sink temperature alarm threshold
parameters.purpose: Defines the heatsink temperature warning level before the fault threshold (P0292) is reached; allows preemptive action

source_citation.excerpt: P0293: Heat sink temperature alarm threshold — Sets the heatsink alarm level before fault threshold.

sources.excerpt: F30001 DC link overvoltage — Overvoltage on the DC link, typically from regenerative braking or mains transients.
F30002 DC link undervoltage — Insufficient DC link voltage, may result from input phase loss or weak supply.
F30003 Input phase loss — One or more phases missing from the 3-phase AC input; check contactor and wiring.
F30004 Motor overtemperature — Motor thermal model exceeded; reduce load, check cooling, or increase ramp time.
F30005 Drive overtemperature — Internal drive temperature exceeded; improve ventilation or reduce duty cycle.
F30006 Inverter overtemperature — Heatsink temperature exceeded threshold (P0292); allow cooling time.
F30007 Overcurrent — Motor phase current exceeded limit; check for phase short, motor stall, or wrong motor parameters.
F30008 Ground fault — Detected low-resistance path to earth; check motor insulation and wiring for faults.
F30009 Parameter checksum error — Drive memory corrupted; try factory reset via P0010 or contact service.
F30010 Internal software error — Firmware issue detected; update firmware or contact Siemens support.
F30011 Communication timeout — Loss of connection with control module; check fieldbus cabling and baud rate.
F30012 Encoder error — Encoder signal missing or corrupted; check encoder connector and wiring.
F7011 Motor overtemperature warning — Motor thermal model approaching limit; reduce speed or load.
P0100: Relative frequency setpoint — Sets the motor speed reference as a percentage of base frequency (fmax).
P0300: Motor type selection — Selects the motor type (1AC, 3AC, DC, PM) for the drive control algorithm.
P0304: Motor rated power — Specifies the motor nameplate power for thermal and load calculations.
P1200: Ramp time (acceleration) — Sets the time duration from 0 to fmax in seconds.
P2010: DC link overvoltage limit — Sets the maximum DC link voltage threshold before overvoltage fault.
P0292: Heat sink temperature threshold — Sets the maximum heatsink temperature for thermal protection.
